product: Custom Docker images for AI Runtime CLI workloads (Beta)
tagline: You can now bring your own Docker container image to AI Runtime CLI (air) workloads.
what_it_does: You can now bring your own Docker container image to AI Runtime CLI (air) workloads. This feature is in Beta. Use a custom image when you need specific system library versions, complex dependencies, or a reproducible environment.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: You can now bring your own Docker container image to AI Runtime CLI (air) workloads.
